name: Apply Fixed Connector Configs
description: Deploy config fixes from Windows. Copy updated website chat and cockpit frontend configs from repo to proper locations. Verify /api/llm/health returns non-degraded response.
reason: Website chat and cockpit frontend were using stale ngrok URLs. Fixed configs point to localhost:5555 (cockpit backend).
steps: Copy larielsystems/chat.html to web server location
Verify cockpit backend is running on :5555
